author: Qu Yuan
description: Composed out of grievance; combines qualities of Guo Feng and Xiao Ya; references Emperor Ku, Duke Huan of Qi, Tang and Wu; expresses moral principles and governance

author: Qu Yuan
description: Poem composed before suicide by drowning in Miluo River

author: Jia Yi
work: Fu on Mourning Qu Yuan (吊屈原赋)
description: Written while crossing Xiang River on way to Changsha

author: Jia Yi
work: Fu on Owl (服乌赋/鵩鸟赋)
description: Written after an owl entered his residence in Changsha; philosophical reflections on fortune, misfortune, life and death

author: Various
work: Other works read by Sima Qian
description: Tian Wen (天问), Zhao Hun (招魂), Ai Ying (哀郢)
